title: Owlnest Lume: Compact Circadian Rhythm Lamp
subtitle: Designed for the 1 to 2 hours before bed with a night-friendly amber spectrum.
description: Owlnest Lume is not a generic night light or a normal warm lamp. It is a compact circadian rhythm lamp designed to support a calmer evening wind-down before sleep.
notice: Preview pricing is now available. Final quantities, shipping details, and campaign timing will be confirmed at launch.

launchFollowerOffer.title: Follow on Indiegogo. Get $5 Off at Launch.
launchFollowerOffer.text: Follow our Indiegogo campaign before launch and you will be eligible for an extra $5 followers discount when the campaign goes live.

activeBackerProgram.title: Join the Conversation. Unlock Future Perks.
activeBackerProgram.text: This is separate from the followers discount. We want to keep the discussion active as Owlnest Lume grows, so especially engaged backers may occasionally be considered for future appreciation perks.

cards.title: Stay Active in Discussion
cards.text: Share feedback, ask thoughtful questions, and take part in community discussion as the project develops.

cards.title: Future Appreciation Perks
cards.text: Especially engaged backers may occasionally be considered for second-generation product opportunities or voucher rewards. Availability and selection details will be announced separately.

timeline.title: Campaign Launch
timeline.text: Our Indiegogo campaign goes live with early supporter pricing.

timeline.title: Production Preparation
timeline.text: Final production scheduling, QA checks, and packaging preparation.

timeline.title: Shipping
timeline.text: Orders begin shipping to supported regions.

faq.a: Owlnest Lume is a compact circadian rhythm lamp designed for nighttime use, especially during the 1 to 2 hours before bed.

faq.q: How is it different from a normal warm lamp or night light?
faq.a: Owlnest Lume is designed around a night-friendly amber spectrum for evening use. It is meant to feel gentler and more sleep-compatible than ordinary bright or generic warm lighting.

faq.q: What do I get if I follow the campaign before launch?
faq.a: Followers on Indiegogo before launch will be eligible for an additional $5 followers discount when the campaign goes live.

faq.q: Is the followers discount the same as the active backer program?
faq.a: No. These are two separate parts of the campaign. Following before launch unlocks the $5 followers discount, while the active backer program is about community participation after joining the campaign.

faq.q: What can active backers be considered for?
faq.a: Especially engaged backers may occasionally be considered for future appreciation perks, such as second-generation product opportunities or voucher rewards. Details and selection criteria will be announced separately.
We plan to ship to select regions including the US, UK, EU, and Taiwan. Final shipping costs and supported destinations will be confirmed at launch.

faq.q: How do I join the community?
faq.a: Our Discord is optional and open to anyone who wants to follow the project, join the conversation, and stay updated as the campaign develops.
All campaign orders are expected to include a standard 1-year limited warranty covering manufacturing defects.
